dev_focus: C2660 DIRECTIVE — GUARD ONLY (3rd consecutive enforcement, open since C19). ALL non-Guard agents HARD PAUSED (status: paused, not conditional). Guard MUST run next. Scope: OWASP top 10 across ENTIRE codebase. Specifics: (1) CSRF — SameSite cookies, Origin header on Server Actions + API routes, (2) Input sanitization — dangerouslySetInnerHTML, raw SQL, unsanitized user input in emails/HTML (especially src/lib/heureka.ts and src/emails/similar-item.ts from C2654-2660), (3) Session security — NextAuth httpOnly/secure/sameSite/expiry, (4) Rate limiting on /api/auth/*, checkout, email capture, dev-chat, cron endpoints, (5) CSP headers — frame-ancestors, script-src, (6) API auth — all admin routes session-check, all cron routes CRON_SECRET, dev-chat Bearer token, (7) XSS in product names/descriptions rendered in email templates. Report findings as JSON: {severity: critical|high|medium|low, location, description, fix}. When done, set next_suggested: lead.
qa_focus: C2660 — Guard security audit ONLY. Do NOT re-audit similar-items cron or 30-day price (Trace verified clean C2657-2659). Focus on systemic security posture. After Guard: if critical/high findings → Bolt fixes. If clean → Bolt builds referral backend (StoreCredit, ref= URL, 150/100 CZK bilateral). 3 TODO items need [x] marking: Heureka ORDER_INFO (line 238), 30-day price (line 239), similar-items cron (line 287).
notes: C2660 Lead — WASTE LOOP CONTINUES (4 cycles deep, C2657-2660). Bolt committed identical Heureka code AGAIN in C2660 despite C2659 pause directive. Root cause: orchestrator queued agents before reading control file update. Fix applied: changed pause condition from until_lead_directive to hard paused + kill_zombie_tasks + reset_no_change_counter. Only Guard should run next. If Guard still doesn't run after this: escalate to bectly — orchestrator may not be reading lead-control.json for Guard scheduling. Confirmed DONE: heureka.ts (1.7k), similar-items/route.ts (5.1k), 30-day price (Trace 3x verified). Effective backlog: 5 items (2 actionable: Guard + GPSR, 3 blocked bectly: R2 creds, Comgate creds, Heureka registration).

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
